name: Beef Burgundy Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon in a 20-ounce casserole dish and cook on high for 1 to 1½ minutes until fully cooked through.
2. Drain the bacon, reserving drippings in the dish. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. In the same casserole dish, stir together flour, beef bouillon granules, and basil with the reserved drippings.
4. Add the stew meat, undrained tomatoes, and wine; mix well until combined.
5. Cook on high for 1 minute, stirring once.
6. Reduce heat to medium and cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring once.
7. Stir in onions and mushrooms, then continue cooking at medium for another 10 to 12 minutes or until the meat is tender, stirring twice.
8. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top and serve.
